# iosxe_interface_stackwise_virtual (Data Source)

This data source can read the Interface Stackwise Virtual configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_interface_stackwise_virtual" "example" {
  type = "TenGigabitEthernet"
  name = "1/0/1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String) Interface type

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `dual_active_detection` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `link` (Number)
